analysis.reasoning: Core message: A neutral informational tweet stating that Secretary Pompeo spoke on several topics (COVID-19, U.S.-Afghan peace process, ICC, WIPO election, China, Iran). It does not include evaluative language, praise, or criticism. Evaluation per narrative: US1 (honorable tradition) – not promoted; no reference to values, history, or tradition. US2 (admirable society) – not promoted; no mention of society, groups, civil society, companies, or heroes. US3 (hostile enemies) – not promoted; although China and Iran are mentioned, there's no framing as enemies or immoral actors. US4 (force for good) – not promoted; mentions the U.S.-Afghan peace process and COVID-19, but without value-laden claims of supporting human rights or helping others. US5 (great international ally) – not promoted; no praise of allies or support statements. US6 (at the forefront) – not promoted; no claim of leadership or superiority. Conclusion: The tweet is purely descriptive and does not promote any listed narrative.
